: Synthesized 2026-05-05 — SSE FIXTURE: closing args fragment + finish_reason in same event
: Pins the fix for audit blocker B3. Real OpenAI streams sometimes
: pack the closing args fragment and finish_reason: tool_calls into a
: single SSE event; the parser must process the args fragment BEFORE
: checking finish_reason or the assembled arguments are truncated and
: the gate never fires.
data: {"id":"chatcmpl-X","object":"chat.completion.chunk","model":"gpt-4","choices":[{"index":0,"delta":{"role":"assistant","content":""}}]}

data: {"id":"chatcmpl-X","object":"chat.completion.chunk","model":"gpt-4","choices":[{"index":0,"delta":{"tool_calls":[{"index":0,"id":"call_abc","type":"function","function":{"name":"bash","arguments":""}}]}}]}

data: {"id":"chatcmpl-X","object":"chat.completion.chunk","model":"gpt-4","choices":[{"index":0,"delta":{"tool_calls":[{"index":0,"function":{"arguments":"{\"cmd\":\"l"}}]}}]}

data: {"id":"chatcmpl-X","object":"chat.completion.chunk","model":"gpt-4","choices":[{"index":0,"delta":{"tool_calls":[{"index":0,"function":{"arguments":"s\"}"}}]},"finish_reason":"tool_calls"}]}

data: [DONE]
